_meta.description: Email templates for client communications. Variables: {host_name}, {host_ip}, {client_name}, {aws_account}, {alert_value}, {timestamp}, {incident_id}

high_memory.subject: ⚠️ High Memory Alert — {host_name} ({client_name})
high_memory.body:
Dear {client_name} Team,

We have detected high memory utilization on one of your servers.

Details:
  Host       : {host_name}
  IP Address : {host_ip}
  AWS Account: {aws_account}
  Memory Use : {alert_value}
  Time       : {timestamp}

Recommended Actions:
  1. Log in to the server and identify memory-intensive processes
  2. Consider restarting the application service if a process is stuck
  3. Review application logs for memory leaks
  4. If this is recurring, consider increasing instance memory (instance type upgrade)

Our team is monitoring this alert. If memory utilization does not reduce within 30 minutes, we will escalate for further investigation.

For questions, reply to this email or raise a support ticket at https://customer.aeonx.support

Regards,
AeonX Cloud Operations Team
+91-XXXXXXXXXX | support@aeonx.digital

high_cpu.subject: ⚠️ High CPU Alert — {host_name} ({client_name})
high_cpu.body:
Dear {client_name} Team,

We have detected high CPU utilization on one of your servers.

Details:
  Host       : {host_name}
  IP Address : {host_ip}
  AWS Account: {aws_account}
  CPU Value  : {alert_value}
  Time       : {timestamp}

Recommended Actions:
  1. Log in to the server and check running processes (Task Manager / top)
  2. Identify the process consuming high CPU
  3. Restart the application if it appears to be stuck or looping
  4. Check application logs for errors or runaway jobs

Our team is monitoring the situation. Please let us know if you need immediate assistance.

Regards,
AeonX Cloud Operations Team
+91-XXXXXXXXXX | support@aeonx.digital

disk_space.subject: 🔴 Low Disk Space Alert — {host_name} ({client_name})
disk_space.body:
Dear {client_name} Team,

Critical: Low disk space detected on one of your servers.

Details:
  Host       : {host_name}
  IP Address : {host_ip}
  AWS Account: {aws_account}
  Disk Usage : {alert_value}
  Time       : {timestamp}

Immediate Actions Required:
  1. Log in and identify large files/directories consuming space
  2. Archive or delete unnecessary log files, temp files, or old backups
  3. If disk usage remains critical, request volume expansion from our team

This is a time-sensitive alert. Servers running out of disk space can cause service outages.
Please take action or contact us at support@aeonx.digital immediately.

Regards,
AeonX Cloud Operations Team
+91-XXXXXXXXXX | support@aeonx.digital

high_load.subject: ⚠️ High Load Average Alert — {host_name} ({client_name})

host_restarted.subject: ℹ️ Server Restart Notification — {host_name} ({client_name})

ec2_terminated.subject: 🔴 URGENT: EC2 Instance Terminated — {host_name} ({client_name})
